questions.question:
An application probe diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `probe-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `probe-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `health-api`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment health-api -n probe-lab -o wide`
- `startupProbeCheck` is `kubectl get deployment health-api -n probe-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].startupProbe.httpGet.path}'`
- `livenessProbeCheck` is `kubectl get deployment health-api -n probe-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].livenessProbe.httpGet.path}'`
- `readinessProbeCheck` is `kubectl get deployment health-api -n probe-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].readinessProbe.httpGet.path}'`
- `portCheck` is `kubectl get deployment health-api -n probe-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].ports[0].containerPort}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n probe-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm startup, liveness, readiness probe paths and thresholds before changing the Deployment manifest`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/probe-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/probe-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Deployment Inventory`, `Probe Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not delete pods, do not restart the Deployment, and do not patch the live probe fields during this drill.

verification.description: The probe diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended workload target, probe inspection commands, events check, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact deployment inventory, probe checks, and safe manifest review commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe probe remediation guidance is removed
